info.description: Multi-Tenant Restaurant POS & Business Management System API
info.title: POS System API

patch.summary: Change a tenant's subscription plan (super admin)
Activate or suspend a tenant (super admin)

get.summary: Full dashboard payload for a date range
Today/WTD/MTD/YTD stat cards with previous-period deltas

post.summary: End the running break
Start a break on the open shift
Clock in (server time; computes lateness vs schedule)
Clock out (computes early-out and overtime)

get.summary: Current clock state for the signed-in employee

post.summary: Approve a completed attendance record (manager+)
Request a password reset email
Login with email and password
Logout the current device session
Logout from every device
Rotate the refresh token and get a new access token
Register an owner account with their first business
Resend the verification email
Reset password using an emailed token

delete.summary: Revoke one of your device sessions

post.summary: Switch the active business
Verify email using an emailed token
Close the drawer with counted cash (variance computed)

get.summary: Get the open drawer session with its movements

post.summary: Open the cash drawer with an opening float
Create a menu category

delete.summary: Delete a menu category (must be empty)

post.summary: Create a coupon
Validate a coupon code against a subtotal (no redemption)
Create a customer
Create a discount
Create an employee
Upload an employee photo (optimized to WebP automatically)

get.summary: List expenses in a date range

post.summary: Record an expense

get.description: Reports API liveness and dependency status (PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO)

post.summary: Acknowledge a stock alert

get.summary: List inventory items with stock levels

post.summary: Create an inventory item

put.summary: Update an inventory item (stock changes go through movements)

post.summary: Apply a stock movement (stock_in, stock_out, adjustment, waste)

get.description: EventSource cannot send headers, so the access token travels as ?token=

post.summary: Create a modifier group with options

put.summary: Update a modifier group and replace its options

get.summary: Recent notifications with the unread count

post.summary: Mark every notification read
Mark one notification read
Create an order (priced server-side from the catalog)

get.summary: Get one order with items and payments

post.summary: Hold or resume an unpaid order
Settle an order with one or more payments (mixed methods)
Flag or unflag a rush order
Refund a completed order (full, by items, or custom amount)
Split an unpaid order into per-person amounts

parameters.description: Split amounts (centavos, must sum to total)
parameters.name: payload

post.summary: Settle one split of a split-billed order
Void an order (manager only; cash returned, coupon released)

get.summary: List products with search, category filter, and pagination

post.summary: Create a product with variants and modifier assignments

get.summary: Get one product with variants and modifier groups

post.summary: Upload a product photo (optimized to WebP automatically)
Create a draft purchase order

get.summary: Get one purchase order with lines

post.summary: Cancel a purchase order
Mark a draft PO as ordered
Receive quantities against a PO (stock in + cost update)

get.summary: Run a report as json, csv, xlsx, or pdf

parameters.description: sales | inventory | employees | attendance | profit | tax | receipts
parameters.name: type

Create a tax
Upload the business logo (optimized to WebP automatically)
